title: anisomeles languida
intro: Anisomeles languida, also known as the Chinese violet or Himalayan anise, is a perennial plant native to the Himalayas and China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Anisomeles languida can be consumed as a tea or used in infusions, and it is also used in traditional Indian medicine, Ayurveda, to treat various ailments.
